component_details.name: Governance Contract
component_details.description: Smart contract managing governance proposals, voting, and delegation.

asset_details.name: Voting Power
asset_details.description: Influence in governance decisions, derived from BGT holdings/delegation.

behavior_details.name: Submit Governance Proposal
behavior_details.description: Protocol submits a governance proposal, typically for whitelisting a Reward Vault or Incentive Token.

data_flow_details.description: Guardian cancels a malicious governance proposal during the timelock.

boundary_details.name: Berachain Bridge to Berachain
boundary_details.description: Separates the external bridging service from the core blockchain network.

security_gap.gap_description: An attacker could potentially initiate transactions as the user if the user's wallet or session is compromised.

actor_risk.description: The actor's primary risk is the potential compromise of their interaction method (e.g., wallet).

actor_details.name: External User
actor_details.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Unauthorized swaps can lead to direct financial loss for the user.

assumptions: The user's wallet seed phrase or private key is compromised.
The user's active session with a dApp interface is hijacked.

mitigation.strategy: Educate users on wallet security best practices; implement session security measures in UIs.

description: An attacker impersonates the user to execute unauthorized token swaps on the BEX, leading to financial loss.

component_details.name: HoneyFactory (Smart Contract)
component_details.description: Central smart contract hub for $HONEY minting, connecting vaults.

asset_details.name: Private Key
asset_details.description: Cryptographic key used to access and control assets in a wallet.

asset_details.name: Voting Power
asset_details.description: Influence in governance decisions, derived from BGT holdings/delegation.

attack_surface.data_description: Mint parameters (collateral type/amount, desired HONEY amount) and signed transaction

behavior_details.name: Increase Incentive Rate
behavior_details.description: Incentive Token Manager increases the rate at which incentive tokens are distributed from a Reward Vault.

data_flow_details.description: Incentive Token Manager adds or updates incentive tokens/rate in a Reward Vault.

boundary_details.name: Berachain Bridge to Berachain
boundary_details.description: Separates the external bridging service from the core blockchain network.

security_gap.gap_description: Transaction parameters could be altered client-side or in transit before signing, leading to incorrect minting details or fees.

actor_risk.description: The actor is interacting with a dApp via a potentially compromisable interface.

actor_details.name: External User
actor_details.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Tampering with mint parameters could result in unexpected token amounts or fees for the user.

assumptions: The user interface (e.g., Berachain Hub) used for minting is compromised.
A malicious browser extension or software intercepts and alters transaction data before signing.

mitigation.strategy: Ensure transaction details are clearly and securely displayed for user confirmation before signing; use secure connection protocols.

description: An attacker tampers with the parameters of a HONEY minting transaction before it is signed by the user's wallet.

component_details.name: Governance Contract
component_details.description: Smart contract managing governance proposals, voting, and delegation.

attack_surface.data_description: Transaction requests targeting the BEX contract

behavior_details.name: Submit Governance Proposal
behavior_details.description: Protocol submits a governance proposal, typically for whitelisting a Reward Vault or Incentive Token.

boundary_details.name: Berachain Bridge to Berachain
boundary_details.description: Separates the external bridging service from the core blockchain network.

security_gap.gap_description: A high volume of transactions (even failed ones) can increase gas costs or temporarily block contract access for legitimate users.

actor_risk.description: An actor can submit a large number of transactions, consuming network resources.

actor_details.name: External User
actor_details.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The BEX contract processes individual swap requests, and high volume can impact availability/cost.

assumptions: The attacker has sufficient $BERA to pay for transaction fees.
The network or contract has processing limits that can be reached by transaction volume.

mitigation.strategy: Implement transaction rate limits at the node/RPC level; ensure contract gas costs scale efficiently; dynamic gas pricing.

description: An attacker floods the BEX smart contract with transaction requests, attempting to disrupt service or inflate gas costs for other users.

component_details.name: BGTIncentiveDistributor (Smart Contract)
component_details.description: Smart contract managing the distribution and claiming of Incentive Tokens for Boosters.

asset_details.name: Voting Power
asset_details.description: Influence in governance decisions, derived from BGT holdings/delegation.

asset_details.name: Liquidity
asset_details.description: Tokens available in liquidity pools for trading.

attack_surface.data_description: Claim request and cryptographic proof of entitlement

behavior_details.name: Distribute Incentive Tokens
behavior_details.description: BGTIncentiveDistributor distributes incentive tokens to eligible users on the chain.

data_flow_details.description: User Wallet claims dApp Fees directly from the FeeCollector smart contract.

boundary_details.name: Berachain Bridge to Berachain
boundary_details.description: Separates the external bridging service from the core blockchain network.

security_gap.gap_description: The BGT Incentive Distributor relies on cryptographic proofs generated off-chain. Flaws in proof generation or validation could allow claiming unearned incentives.

actor_risk.description: The actor attempts to claim resources they are not entitled to by exploiting the claim mechanism.

actor_details.name: External User
actor_details.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Successful exploitation leads to theft of incentive tokens belonging to others.

assumptions: There is a vulnerability in the off-chain service that generates incentive proofs.
There is a vulnerability in the BGT Incentive Distributor contract's proof validation logic.

mitigation.strategy: Implement robust and audited proof generation and on-chain validation logic; use widely accepted cryptographic primitives.

description: An attacker attempts to claim incentive tokens belonging to other users by providing a fraudulent or manipulated cryptographic proof to the BGT Incentive Distributor contract.
